race.comment: EMPEROR (3) has been freshened up since finishing well back in the Lightning over today's journey at Eagle Farm six weeks ago. Races best with the runs well spaced. Poses a big threat with a soft run assured from an inside alley. TECTONIC PLATE (9) tried hard but found the in-form My Mum's Toyboy a bit too strong over 1190m here recently. Genuine mare who won't mind coming back in trip. Drawn to play a key role. DUROVA (7) is back after a nine-week break. Has won three from five when fresh from a spell and four from six at 1000m. Hard to ignore those credentials. MISTER BIANCO (6) trialled well at Deagon recently and looks ready to make a positive return after 131 days in the paddock. ZOUTASTIC (10) wasn't beaten all that far when fresh from a spell at Randwick last start. Good each-way hope down in the weights.
